productDisplayName: Converse Men United White Casual Shoes
description: The Chuck Taylor All Star is a symbol of originality and self-expression the world over. The pioneers that put the amp;lsquo squeakamp;rsquo in Basketball have been an off-the-court favourite of rock stars and rebels for the past 60 years. Dedicated to basketball champ Chuck Taylor, these Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse, also called Chucks come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite. Upper denim upper for easy maintenance and durability Upper with All Star patch detailing beside the ankle and graffiti on the other side of the ankle Graffiti print all over the upper Contrast lacing for maximum style Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Eyelets on the lateral side for ventilation Midsole Midsole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe and heel region and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains Slipper care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm waterWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
